name: Octopus with Garlic (Polipi Veraci All'aglio)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut out the eyes and mouth of the octopus.
2. Remove the ink sac and internal bones.
3. Cut off the tough points in the tentacles.
4. Place each octopus on a board and beat well to break fibers and make meat more tender.
5. Wash in running water until very white; do not dry, but put in an earthenware dish.
6. Season with oil flavored with garlic, bay leaf, and cumin seeds.
7. Cover the dish tightly with waxed paper or foil tied around the top.
8. Place over a very low heat for 1 to 2 hours, depending on size of octopus.
9. When tender, drain and season with additional oil, salt, green pepper, rosemary leaves, and parsley.
10. Serve in a tureen.
